laws.title: Public Law 14-91 | Military Code of Military Justice Reform Act of 2023
laws.status_basis: The source is readable and the act is a general and permanent military-justice measure, but the archive places it as a statutory note at 2 U.S.C. section 190d rather than a live UCMJ rewrite.
laws.required_code_treatment: Keep the act as statutory-note material at 2 U.S.C. section 190d; do not infer any UCMJ rewrite.

current_implementation.branch_vs_origin: the report identifies a statutory-note anchor at 2 U.S.C. section 190d

provisions.exact_change: Preserve as note material; no direct Code rewrite is identified.
provisions.evidence: "Uniform Code of Military Justice Reform Act of 2023"

provisions.text_summary: Definition tying the act to the proposed UCMJ framework.
provisions.exact_change: Preserve the definition as note material.

provisions.text_summary: Severability plus a supersession clause that limits later laws unless they expressly override this act.
provisions.exact_change: Keep the saving clause as historical note material only.
provisions.notes: This is background and savings language.

provisions.text_summary: Findings describing the role of the Uniform Code of Military Justice in military justice and readiness.
provisions.exact_change: Preserve the findings as note material.
provisions.evidence: "Uniform Code of Military Justice is an essential component"

provisions.text_summary: Immediate application of the revised military-justice framework to the armed forces.
provisions.exact_change: Preserve the operational instruction as note material only.
provisions.evidence: "immediately applied to all branches of the U.S Armed Forces"
provisions.notes: No concrete Code section is named.

provisions.exact_change: Preserve the enactment clause as note material.

laws.recommended_action: Keep the act as statutory-note material at 2 U.S.C. section 190d.
laws.chronology_conclusion: The enactment is general and permanent but does not supply a uniquely executable UCMJ rewrite; note treatment is the proper disposition.
